_comment: The REAL game's main characters. Not exploring skeletons anymore — the human skeleton is fixed. Exactly two characters: default_boy and default_girl, each generated as a persistent 8-direction static PixelLab character (create-character-with-8-directions). No animations, no outfits — just the awesome 8-direction base model. If a character folder is deleted, the loop regenerates it as a fresh, slightly different variation (a new seed), so you can reroll until happy.
_style_base: Empty on purpose — the character prompts below are self-contained (they carry their own style direction). Do NOT append a 'Grave Seasons / Stardew Valley' style here: it pushed the heroes toward generic farmers.

budget._comment: Low floor — this is only two cheap characters; it can run on the last of the shared pool / usd credits.

characters.default_boy: A young male adventurer at the very start of his journey, before he has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how he looks before any equipment is picked up. Confident, tough and genuinely badass with a cool rebellious edge, a hardened fearless expression, sharp intense eyes, tousled dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. His stance is relaxed but ready and self-assured. He wears ONLY plain, simple, unremarkable starting clothes in muted natural colors — a plain worn shirt or tunic and simple trousers with basic boots — strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful. He has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. He must still look cool, memorable, capable and badass through his face, hair and posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
characters.default_girl: A young female adventurer at the very start of her journey, before she has found any gear, weapons or armor — this is the bare starting character, exactly how she looks before any equipment is picked up, stripped down to only the base layer worn beneath armor. Extremely tough, self-assured and powerfully confident, with a fierce, determined expression and a commanding, unshakable posture. Sharp intense eyes, dark brown hair, and a lean, athletic, toned build that shows real strength and agility. Her stance is grounded, strong and self-assured — shoulders back, chin level, radiating quiet badass energy. She wears ONLY the plain, simple base-layer underclothes worn beneath armor — a modest basic cloth undershirt or chest wrap and simple linen undershorts — muted and understated, strictly in browns, blacks, greys and off-white, nothing colorful; not casual modern clothes, not jeans, not a t-shirt. Modest and practical, not sexualized, not cute, not a princess, not a dress. She has NO gear of any kind: no armor, no jacket, no shoulder guard, no cloak, no utility belt, no gloves, no weapon, no sword, no dagger, no bags or pouches — completely unequipped. She still looks cool, memorable, capable and genuinely badass through her fierce determined face, dark brown hair and commanding posture alone. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, restrained muted earth-tone palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
